1.content:
That's it Tommy pickles I'm going to change your dirty diapie and then I'm done being older than you. Wait what how will you be done with being older than me when you are older, you dumb baby it's simple I'm going to start acting like you. What happens next?

(a) she grabs a diapie for Tommy and one for herself and has Tommy put the diapie on her after she's done changing him.
(b) she grabs a diapie for Tommy and one for herself and after she's done changing him, she waits till he's gone before putting her own diapie on.
1.title: can't stand it anymore and decides she's a baby

info.brief_description: After awhile Angelica is tired of Tommy and his friends asking her questions.
info.description: Hey Angelica why do male dogs lift their leg to pee. I don't know everything Tommy so why don't you just ask your mom. So Angelica thinks to herself, well I hate to do what I'm about to do but it's probably the only I'll get those dumb babies to quit asking me questions. So Angelica waits patiently for one of the babies to need a, she says to herself I can't believe I'm going say this a diapie change. When all of a sudden bingo Tommy walks by with a dirty diapie, and so Angelica says I'll change you Tommy. does Angelica put a diapie on herself after she's done changing Tommy while Tommy is still in the room or not? Does Angelica go full baby immediately or start out slowly with just a pacifier and wearing diapies and going pee and poo in them?
info.pretty_title: Angelica wants to be a baby
